footer_description: Discover more activities in our welcome email!
footer_brand_desc: A pair of family-run Spanish rentals on the Mar Menor — booked direct, hosted by Loan.
errors_end_after_start: The end date must be after the start date.
errors_positive_price_required: The price must be a positive number.
reservation_form_placeholder_description: Hello, I would like to make a reservation...
reservation_toaster_success: Your reservation from {startDate} to {endDate} has been sent to the host.
reservation_toaster_error: An error occurred while processing your reservation!
home_hero_paragraph: Two family-run Spanish rentals on the edge of the Mediterranean's only inland sea — a beachfront casa in the village, a quiet penthouse over the golf course.
home_intro_paragraph: Whether you want salt-air mornings five minutes from the beach, or quiet sunset terraces over the fairway, we built one of these for each of you. Pick the one that fits the week you have in mind.
home_story_p1: We built this small collection one stay at a time. Casa DaNa came first — the family casa, the rooftop, the slow Saturdays. Casa CasAy followed when guests started asking for somewhere quieter, with a pool, a little inland.
home_story_p2: We host both ourselves: direct bookings, no agencies, no fees added at checkout. If you write us, you're writing the person who picked the linens.
home_cta_strip_tail: on the Mar Menor — your pick of casa.
prop_casadana_short_description: A six-person Spanish casa with a private rooftop solarium and jacuzzi, just 1.6 km from the Mar Menor. Built for slow mornings, long lunches, and the kind of trip you tell people about for years.
prop_casacasay_short_description: An elegant 104 m² penthouse in a secure community, fifteen minutes inland. A wide terrace with uninterrupted views of the golf course — the kind of place you remember at the end of a quiet, sunlit week.
casadana_description: Discover our charming Spanish rental house in Los Alcázares, perfect for accommodating up to six people. Just 1.6 km from the beach, you'll find plenty of activities nearby to enhance your stay.
casadana_checklist_sixth: A town not overcrowded with tourists
casadana_gallery_description: Every room is designed with an editorial eye, blending local textures with modern luxury.
casadana_about_title: Refined Living on the Mar Menor
casadana_experiences_description: From high-speed thrills to serene maritime journeys, the Mar Menor offers activities for every soul.
casadana_local_area_description: Los Alcázares is more than a destination; it's a sensory experience. From the therapeutic waters of the Mar Menor to the hidden thermal springs of Archena, discover a region where history and wellness converge.
casadana_los_alcazares_description: Los Alcázares, a charming village nestled in the heart of Spain, enchants with its authenticity and warm atmosphere. Surrounded by picturesque landscapes, this haven of peace offers a perfect blend of tradition and modernity. With its quaint streets, local markets, and proximity to the beach (Mar Menor), Los Alcázares is an ideal destination for lovers of culture, nature, and relaxation.
casacasay_description:
Welcome to Casa CasAy, an elegant 104 m² penthouse designed for your comfort and relaxation. Nestled in a secure gated community, it offers a superb terrace with breathtaking views of the golf course, ideal for savoring every moment in complete serenity.
Perfect for accommodating up to 4 people, this haven of tranquility is located just 15 minutes from the Mar Menor and Los Alcázares, where you will also find Casa DaNa.
Let yourself be seduced by a place where comfort, calm and sunshine come together to create unforgettable memories.
gallery_description: Discover our gallery of carefully selected photos, highlighting the unique charms of our properties.
villa_booking_stay_about_label: A few words about your stay
villa_booking_no_charge_note: No charge yet · Confirmation within 48 hours
villa_casadana_ribbon_5: Calm waters of the Mar Menor
villa_casadana_about_lead: A Spanish house for six people, designed for slow mornings, long lunches on the roof and leisurely returns from the sea.
villa_casadana_about_body: Casa DaNa is located in a quiet residential area of Los Alcázares, just 1.6 km from the only inland sea in the Mediterranean. Three bedrooms, two terraces, a jacuzzi and a private solarium — designed for families and small groups who want the pace of the South without the crowds of the Costa.
villa_casadana_gallery_description: Each piece is designed with an editorial eye, blending local textures with understated, modern luxury. Touch a piece to explore its full gallery.
villa_casadana_local_area_description: Los Alcázares is more than a destination; it's a sensory experience. From the therapeutic waters of the Mar Menor to the hidden thermal springs of Archena, this is a region where history and well-being still dictate the rhythm of the day.
villa_casadana_local_area_point_1_descri: Stroll among the Roman thermal ruins and along the seafront. Tapas, Tuesday market and salty mornings.
villa_casadana_local_area_point_2_descri: A 40-minute drive inland, the famous Roman thermal spa is nestled in the Ricote Valley.
villa_casadana_local_area_point_3_descri: Sail to the lighthouse, dive in the marine reserve, dine on the narrow strip between two seas.
villa_casadana_local_area_point_4_descri: Baroque cathedral, the casino, late-night terraces on the Plaza de las Flores.
villa_casadana_local_area_point_5_descri: Direct flights from London, Manchester, Paris and Brussels.
villa_casadana_experiences_description: From high-speed thrills to serene sea voyages, the Mar Menor offers something for everyone. Our concierge service will help you book any of these activities.
villa_casadana_experiences_1_description: Professional slopes for the ultimate adrenaline rush, just minutes from the villa.
villa_casadana_experiences_2_description: Enjoy the coastal breeze on the calm, shallow and inviting waters of the inland sea.
villa_casadana_experiences_3_description: Water slides, lazy rivers and wave pools — a perfect family day out under the Murcian sun.
villa_casadana_experiences_4_description: Paddle through the hidden coves and silent shores of the Mar Menor at your own pace.
villa_casadana_reviews_description: Eighty-seven reviews on Airbnb, Booking and direct booking. We keep them all — the sunrise on the roof comes up often.
villa_casadana_reviews_1_quote: The rooftop at sunrise alone is worth the trip — coffee, the cries of seagulls, the Mar Menor turning pink. Loan has thought of everything, right down to the laundry.
villa_casadana_reviews_2_quote: A real Spanish house, not a rental agency. Quiet street, perfect food, and the jacuzzi was the highlight after long days at the beach. We'll be back in the off-season.
villa_casadana_reviews_3_meta: Bristol, United Kingdom · Stay in June 2025
villa_casadana_reviews_3_quote: Six people, three generations. We felt at home, not in an Airbnb. The barbecue and the solarium turned every evening into a memory.
villa_casadana_faq_intro: A few quick answers — for the rest, write to us directly and we will reply within a few hours.
villa_casadana_faq_1_answer: Three nights in low season (Oct.–May) and five nights in high season (June–Sept.). For full weeks from Saturday to Saturday, we offer a 10% discount on the nightly rate.
villa_casadana_faq_2_question: How does the arrival process unfold?
villa_casadana_faq_2_answer: Self check-in from 4 pm via a smart lock — we send the code 24 hours before arrival. The host or a local contact is always reachable in less than 30 minutes if needed.
villa_casadana_faq_3_question: Is the villa suitable for families with young children?
villa_casadana_faq_3_answer: Yes — a travel cot, high chair, and stair gate are provided on request free of charge. The Mar Menor itself is a shallow, calm inland sea, ideal for little swimmers.
villa_casadana_faq_4_question: Can we organize an event or a party?
villa_casadana_faq_4_answer: The villa is located on a quiet residential street, and we ask guests to keep their conversational tone after 11 p.m. Small gatherings (up to 8 people) are perfectly welcome.
villa_casadana_faq_5_answer: Yes — we work with a local driver from Corvera (RMU, 30 min) and Alicante (ALC, 1 hour). One-way fares start from €45 / €95 respectively. Book via the concierge after confirmation.
villa_casadana_faq_6_answer: Full refund up to 30 days before arrival. 50% refund between 15 and 30 days before. Within the last 14 days, the stay is non-refundable but fully reschedulable within 12 months.
villa_casadana_cta_strip_tail: They are waiting for you at Casa DaNa.
villa_casadana_sister_description: Casa CasAy is our two-bedroom penthouse in a secure residence, fifteen minutes inland — large south-facing terrace, shared pool, unobstructed views of the golf course. Same hosts, same service.
villa_casacasay_ribbon_5: 30 minutes from the center of Murcia
villa_casacasay_about_lead: A 104 m² penthouse with a south-facing terrace, designed for leisurely mornings, late lunches overlooking the fairway and long nights of sleep.
villa_casacasay_about_body: Casa CasAy is located in a small, secure gated community fifteen minutes inland from Los Alcázares. With two bedrooms, a large terrace, and unobstructed views of the golf course, it's the perfect place for couples, friends, and small families seeking a quieter base than the beachfront.
villa_casacasay_gallery_description: The full photoshoot is coming soon — for now, here's a sneak peek of the terrace and pool. Write to us and we'll send you the rest.
villa_casacasay_local_area_description: A short drive between the salt flats, the village, and the sea—but with the tranquility of the inland valleys. Spend your mornings on the terrace, drive to the Mar Menor for lunch, and return for sunset on the green.
villa_casacasay_local_area_point_1_descr: The seaside village, the inland sea, our sister property Casa DaNa.
villa_casacasay_local_area_point_2_descr: Baroque cathedral, casino, late-night terraces on the Plaza de las Flores.
villa_casacasay_local_area_point_3_descr: Famous Roman thermal spa nestled in the Ricote Valley.
villa_casacasay_local_area_point_4_descr: Direct flights from London, Manchester, Paris and Brussels.
villa_casacasay_reviews_description: Forty-one stays verified to date. The terrace at golden hour and the tranquility are frequently mentioned.
villa_casacasay_reviews_1_quote: A real find. The terrace overlooks the green — coffee at sunrise, wine at sunset, and nobody around. Beautifully maintained, every detail thought out.
villa_casacasay_reviews_2_quote: Quieter than expected and exactly what we needed. The pool is peaceful, the residence is secure, and Loan answered every question within minutes.
villa_casacasay_reviews_3_quote: Perfect base for a week of golf. Bright interiors, fast Wi-Fi, and 15 minutes to lunch at the Mar Menor. Already rebooked for spring.
villa_casacasay_cta_strip_tail: — Your week starts at Casa CasAy.
villa_casacasay_sister_description: Casa DaNa is our family-run guesthouse for six people in Los Alcázares itself — rooftop solarium, jacuzzi, and 1.6 km from the Mar Menor. Same hosts, same care.
villa_booking_error_dates_conflict: Those dates were just taken. Please pick others.
villa_booking_error_unknown_villa: We could not find this villa. Please refresh.
villa_booking_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
villa_booking_success_body: We received your request and will be in touch shortly.
